JIANGXIAOMOD-RUINANCE.title: Endurance
JIANGXIAOMOD-QING_MANG.title: Azure Ray
JIANGXIAOMOD-QING_MANG.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Target loses {M:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
If target has [blue]Artifact[/blue], deal {X}x damage.
[gold]Strike[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-STRIKE_JIANG_XIAO.title: Strike
JIANGXIAOMOD-DEFEND_JIANG_XIAO.title: Defend
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING.title: Blessing
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_ENEMY_TOKEN.title: Blessing: Enemy
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_ENEMY_TOKEN.descri: Heal an enemy for {HealAmount:diff()} HP and Stun them.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_ALLY_TOKEN.title: Blessing: Ally
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_ALL_ENEMY_TOKEN.de: Heal all enemies for {HealAmount:diff()} HP and Stun them.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_SELF_TOKEN.title: Blessing: Self
JIANGXIAOMOD-CHENG_YIN.title: Seal of Light
JIANGXIAOMOD-CHENG_YIN.description:
Apply [gold]Seal of Light[/gold] to an ally.
When damaged, gain {M} stacks of [gold]Regen[/gold]; guides the healing light of the bell.
JIANGXIAOMOD-ZHONG_LING.title: Chime Bell
JIANGXIAOMOD-ZHONG_LING.description: Cast healing rays to heal random targets {Magic:diff()} times, restoring {Heal:diff()} HP per hit. Prioritizes allies with [gold]Seal of Light[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-DAWN.title: Dawn
JIANGXIAOMOD-DAWN.description: Apply to an ally: {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and {M} stacks of [gold]Dawn[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-YEARNING.title: Yearning Halo
JIANGXIAOMOD-YEARNING.description:
Apply [gold]Yearning Halo[/gold] to all allies with [gold]Dawn[/gold].
If none exist, apply to all units.
Currently provides {M}% Lifesteal.
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT.title: Retrograde Light
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT.descriptio: Choose [gold]Enemy[/gold] or [gold]Ally[/gold]: Average your HP with the target.
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT_ENEMY.desc: [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Choose an enemy; average your HP with theirs.
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT_ALLY.title: Retrograde Light: Ally
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT_ALLY.descr: [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Choose an ally; average your HP with theirs.
JIANGXIAOMOD-RESENTMENT.title: Resentment
JIANGXIAOMOD-RESENTMENT.description: When attacked, has a {M:diff()}% chance to apply a random [gold]Debuff[/gold] to the attacker.
JIANGXIAOMOD-SPACE_GAP.title: Temporal Rift
JIANGXIAOMOD-SPACE_GAP.description:
Gain {M:diff()} [blue]Intangible[/blue].
At [red]Diamond Tier[/red], apply 1 [blue]Intangible[/blue] to an ally.
JIANGXIAOMOD-ABUNDANT_STAR.title: Star Abundance
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_CONCEAL.title: Stellar Conceal
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_CONCEAL.description:
Choose an ally; they gain {E:diff()} [blue]Energy[/blue].
At [red]Diamond Tier[/red], affects all allies.
JIANGXIAOMOD-SHADOW_OF_VOID.title: Void Shadow Ruins
JIANGXIAOMOD-STRENGTHEN_TOKEN.title: Strengthen
JIANGXIAOMOD-STRENGTHEN_TOKEN.descriptio: Choose a card in your deck to Upgrade.
JIANGXIAOMOD-REST_TOKEN.title: Rest
JIANGXIAOMOD-SECONDARY_FACE.title: Secondary Phase
JIANGXIAOMOD-SECONDARY_FACE.description: Choose 1 card in hand; add {M:diff()} copies of it into your hand. Copies cost 0 and have [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-TEAR_OF_SORROW.title: Tears of Sorrow
JIANGXIAOMOD-TEAR_OF_SORROW.description:
Give all units {M:diff()} stacks of [gold]Tears of Sorrow[/gold].
(If Star Skill is [red]Platinum Tier[/red] or higher, only affects all enemies).
JIANGXIAOMOD-CLEAN_TEARS.title: Cleansing Tears
JIANGXIAOMOD-CLEAN_TEARS.description:
Remove {M:diff()} [blue]Status[/blue] & [blue]Curse[/blue] cards from your Draw Pile, Hand, and Discard Pile.
Also remove all [gold]Debuffs[/gold] from all allies.
JIANGXIAOMOD-UNARMED_STRIKE.title: Unarmed Strike
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE1.title: Xia Style Blade 1: Cross-Cut
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE2.title: Xia Style Blade 2: Vertical-Cut
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE3.title: Xia Style Blade 3: Vertical-Cut
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE_TRUE.title: True Xia Style: Clan Purge
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE_TRUE.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Deals {X}x damage if you have Xia Blade Style 1, 2, and 3.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BASIC_ARROW.title: Basic Arrow
JIANGXIAOMOD-BASIC_ARROW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {M:diff()} cards with [blue]Archery Mastery[/blue].
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_ARROW.title: Star Power Arrow
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_ARROW.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
(Enhanced by [gold]Archery Mastery Level[/gold] & [gold]Star Power Level[/gold]).
JIANGXIAOMOD-WITHERING_ARROW.title: Withering Arrow
JIANGXIAOMOD-GOD_SKILL_STRIKE.title: God: Technique Strike
JIANGXIAOMOD-GOD_SKILL_STRIKE.descriptio:
Play all [gold]Basic Technique[/gold] cards.
Gain {M} [gold]Strength[/gold] for each card played.
JIANGXIAOMOD-GOD_STAR_STRIKE.title: God: Star Skill Strike
JIANGXIAOMOD-GOD_STAR_STRIKE.description:
Play all [gold]Star Skill[/gold] cards.
Gain {M} [gold]Strength[/gold] for each card played.
JIANGXIAOMOD-MUAY_THAI_TECHNIQUE.title: Muay Thai Technique
JIANGXIAOMOD-CUNJIN_ECHO.title: Fist: Echo
JIANGXIAOMOD-CUNJIN_ECHO.description: Choose an Attack card in hand; apply [gold]Echo[/gold] {M:diff()} to it.
JIANGXIAOMOD-DAGGER_ATTACK.title: Dagger Attack
JIANGXIAOMOD-DAGGER_BURST.title: Dagger Burst
JIANGXIAOMOD-DAGGER_ALL_OUT_STRIKE.title: Dagger All-Out Strike
JIANGXIAOMOD-FANG_TIAN_JI_HEAVY_STRIKE.d:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Apply {M:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-FANG_TIAN_JI_DEFENSIVE.desc:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Apply {M:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for all allies.
JIANGXIAOMOD-FANG_TIAN_JI_OFFENSIVE.desc: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies {X} times.
